name: product_review_drop_alert
description: Product PROD_001 has experienced a critical drop in average review score from 4.2 to 2.1 (delta -2.1). Recent reviews consistently show 1-2 star ratings with quality complaints. The system should recognize this as a critical severity issue requiring both report generation and owner notification.

links.name: reviews
links.description: Recent reviews for PROD_001, total 24 reviews in last 7 days

items.text: Not worth the price, poor quality

links.summary: All 24 recent reviews rated 1-2 stars. Common complaints: quality issues, defects, misleading description. No positive reviews in the window.

expected_decision.reasoning: Product PROD_001 avg review score dropped from 4.2 to 2.1 (delta -2.1, CRITICAL). The product_review_drop_7d metric confirms a sustained decline of -2.1 points. All 24 recent reviews are 1-2 star ratings with consistent complaints about quality, defects, and misleading product description. This is not an isolated anomaly but a systemic quality issue. Recommend export_report to generate a detailed quality analysis report for root cause investigation, and notify_owner to alert the product owner for immediate intervention.

recommended_actions.rationale: Export detailed quality report for PROD_001 to enable root cause analysis of the sudden and sustained review score drop

params.message: Your product PROD_001 has received critically low reviews (avg 2.1/5.0, down from 4.2 baseline). All 24 recent reviews cite quality issues including defects and misleading description. Immediate attention required.

recommended_actions.rationale: Notify product owner about critical review score drop with specific quality concerns raised by customers for immediate intervention

severity.description: Decision severity must be 'critical' given 50% drop in review score (baseline 4.2 to 2.1) and consistent 1-2 star quality complaints across all recent reviews

confidence.description: Confidence must be >= 0.8 because evidence is clear, consistent, and unambiguous: sustained metric drop, correlated review text complaints, and no contradictory signals

decision.description: Decision must be 'escalate' because the problem is critical (product quality affecting customers) and requires human intervention beyond simple monitoring

actions.description: Must recommend both export_report (for root cause analysis) and notify_owner (for immediate owner intervention). Both are required because the issue needs investigation plus action.

evidence_refs.description: Must reference all three evidence keys: the avg review score metric, the drop metric, and the reviews link. These three items collectively establish the quantitative drop, the sustained trend, and the qualitative reason.

forbidden_actions.description: No specific forbidden actions for this case type
